programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: The Balancing Act: Behind the Mystery: Rare Diseases
programme.desc: How the gut can play a role in a serious kidney disease; what you need to know about Sickle Cell Anemia.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Gift
programme.desc: A ten-year-old received a Secret Santa gift that had a huge impact on her life. Now a driven young journalist, she searches for the person who sent her the gift as a child.

programme.title: Movie: The Magical Christmas Shoes
programme.desc: A pair of magical shoes appear during a young woman's holiday season and help her discover her Christmas spirit.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Mississippi
programme.desc: A photographer returns home for Christmas just as the annual holiday light show is resurrected. She volunteers to pitch in, but soon discovers her high-school sweetheart is also helping out.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Ever After
programme.desc: A popular romance novelist spends every Christmas at her favorite bed & breakfast, but this year she’s faced with a severe case of writer’s block. Luckily, inspiration strikes in the unlikely form of the B&B’s new owner.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Predator or Prey?
programme.desc: Explore cases that pose hard questions about the U.S. capital punishment system.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Caught on Tape
programme.desc: When a Spaniard is sentenced to death for the murder of a young Florida couple, his family appeals to the international media to fight his conviction.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: The Hit That Wasn't
programme.desc: In Philadelphia, the brazen killing of a state's witness leads police to an alleged hitman but the evidence against him could be nothing more than smoke and mirrors.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ghost in the Machine
programme.desc: In May of 1999, a minister's wife died in the bathtub from being unconscious.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flower Power
programme.desc: Two different men call police to report the same murder. Apparently, neither one knew that the other had called.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives: The Madison Rutherford Case
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman is found in his rental car. When the victim's wife files a claim for $7 million of life insurance, investigators seek the help of a forensic anthropologist and uncover a chilling scheme of fraud and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death by a Salesman
programme.desc: Even though there were no witnesses, police manage to track down murderer less than 12 hours after the fact. Using fingerprints at the scene and security camera footage, officers arrested the perpetrator even though he was out of the state, on a bus.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple die in a housefire their son becomes the prime suspect. The son insists that he is innocent, and that his efforts to extinguish the fire made it worse. Investigators turn to science to determine the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soiled Plan
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search after a mother of two young children went missing. Days later they found her body. Then the case went cold for twenty years, until advances in technology allowed the investigators to see the case in a new light.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up on Crime
programme.desc: The case of a decomposed body found in an irrigation canal goes unsolved until shoe prints left by the careless criminal while dumping the body of his second victim give authorities the evidence they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tight-Fitting Genes
programme.desc: A behavioral profile is helpful in a murder investigation, but it's not an answer.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: You'll Never Find Him
programme.desc: 6-year-old Timmothy Pitzen vanishes after a three-day trip to waterparks and the zoo with his mom. In a terrifying twist, his mom is found dead in a motel room with a disturbing note by her side.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All the World's a Stage
programme.desc: Police must investigate one of their own when a detective says his wife shot herself in the head. While he claims he called 911 as soon as he could, evidence makes police doubt the detective's story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Big Chill
programme.desc: When a woman dies after a long illness, investigators have to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide, or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: A woman becomes critically ill, leaving her unable to walk. As her symptoms worsen, she gets a bone marrow test. The results reveal arsenic. Investigators now have to determine if she was poisoned by water contamination, or something far more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stick 'em Up
programme.desc: When a bank president is found floating in a nearby lake, taped to a chair, forensic experts start piecing together the tape and discover a missing piece. It's this piece, and tips pouring in from residents, that will lead to a capture.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Head Games
programme.desc: To celebrate one year of marriage, a young couple goes on a camping trip. When the husband is shot and killed, the wife is so distraught she gives two different stories of what happened. When forensic psychiatry intervenes, the truth is finally learned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Making the Collar
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl goes missing, and nine months later, her body is found. Forensic scientists narrow it down to a postal worker with a dog and red carpet, just with the evidence found on the girl's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Telltale Tracks
programme.desc: Police found an abandoned car on the highway and assumed the driver had been the victim of a car-jacking. When they find the victim's body, unusual marks on her body lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ghost in the Machine
programme.desc: In May of 1999, a minister's wife died in the bathtub from being unconscious.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: The Enemy Within
programme.desc: An young father allegedly murders his parents in a haze of rage and drug-addiction then abandons his child and flees to the American South.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Frozen Prison
programme.desc: An alleged rapist forces his 17-year-old victim to marry him, then imprisons her in a psychological cage for seven years.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: The Disappearing
programme.desc: A mother kills herself, leaving behind no sign of her son. Also, an ex-boyfriend allegedly kills four members of his ex-girlfriend's family.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Enemy Territory
programme.desc: A Chicago teen who refuses to declare his allegiance to a violent gang after he stumbles onto their turf winds up beaten and shot to death in an alleyway. Then, a man accused of killing an Iraq War veteran while driving under the influence flees.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Fugitive Mom
programme.desc: A young mother chooses to vanish with her two-year-old daughter and a serial child molester is caught in Texas, but flees his trial and begins his monstrous pattern again.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Art of the 'Shine: 500 Gallon Still
programme.desc: Presenting the 'Art of Shine' with Mark, Digger and Tim. Tim Smith hires a person with a checkered past to help at the distillery in Kentucky. In North Carolina, Jeff and Mark are surprised by an unexpected visitor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Hard Times Make the Best Shine
programme.desc: With national supply chains disrupted, Mark and Digger unearth a ton of free ingredients, Tickle helps Josh build a submarine still farm and Mike designs a first-ever backwoods column still, perfect for endless runs of high-quality low-cost liquor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outlaw Cuts: Interstate Alliance
programme.desc: With bonus scenes and added features: Josh and Tickle forge a peach-brandy-making alliance while Mark and Digger's corn supply dries up. Later, Mike and Jerry's column still disastrously spews ethanol vapor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Mark and Digger's Big Test
programme.desc: With his partner in quarantine, Digger has much more on the line than shine. Mike and Jerry's moonshine Frankenstein turns on its creators. After decades in the backwoods, mountain man Mark Rogers enlists his dad to run with him for the first time.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outlaw Cuts: Outlaw Holidays
programme.desc: As Christmastime approaches in Appalachia, the shiners come together with both new and old-time traditions intended to make this holiday season one to remember.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Secret Backwoods Recipes
programme.desc: Only a handful of moonshine recipes are considered among the best, but the path to perfection is always paved with spills.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Mark and Digger's Big Test
programme.desc: With his partner in quarantine, Digger has much more on the line than shine. Mike and Jerry's moonshine Frankenstein turns on its creators. After decades in the backwoods, mountain man Mark Rogers enlists his dad to run with him for the first time.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tim's Temptation
programme.desc: Tim and Tickle return to the scene of past crimes. Mark and Digger scramble to rescue a legacy mash from escaped livestock. Mark and Huck build a double proofing still.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outracing the Law
programme.desc: With a secret family recipe and a rich legacy in Carolina moonshine, Josh Owens races headlong into a new season. What's a few broken bones when you're building underground still sites and selling shine at $200 a gallon, just one step ahead of the law.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Rick's Sixth Sense
programme.desc: Rick risks his season on a hunch that he's discovered new hot spot. Tony mobilizes an arsenal to cash in on lost gold. Fred's veteran crew fight old equipment.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Miners, Dive-Ins and Drives
programme.desc: Rick and Kruse talk their successful start to the season. Mitch and Doumitt call in from Oregon and Dustin and Carlos take us into the frigid Alaskan white water to talk nuggets, and lots of them.

programme.title: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar: Curse of the Black Chalice
programme.desc: Two treasure hunters examine their most stunning find: the Black Obsidian Chalice. Together, they investigate the treasure's mysterious origins, decode its strange markings and reveal the secret ceremonies where it may have once been used.

programme.title: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar: Secrets in the Sword
programme.desc: Two treasure hunters travel to the Holy Land to investigate if their prized sword once belonged to the Grand Master of the Knights Templar. Cutting-edge archaeology reveals a network of hidden tunnels in Jerusalem with ties to the Bible's greatest relics.

programme.title: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar: The Nazi's Cursed Quest
programme.desc: Two treasure hunters retrace the investigations of Nazi relic hunters who searched for the Holy Grail and other lost Templar relics. Their expedition reveals just how close the Nazis came to uncovering ground-breaking Templar secrets.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Josh travels to the remote and landmine-riddled jungles of Cambodia to investigate the lost city of the Khmer Empire and search for a mystical relic that over 1,000 years ago gave its God King the power to incinerate his enemies.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Chupacabra
programme.desc: In the dark caves and thick jungles of Puerto Rico, Josh Gates tracks a possible Chupacabra.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Fortune of the Buzzard
programme.desc: Josh Gates takes on the Indian Ocean's punishing waters as he chases the lost treasure of Olivier Levasseur, AKA 'The Buzzard,' rumored to be worth more than a billion dollars.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Warrior Queen's Treasure
programme.desc: Searching across England, Josh Gates unearths a cache of ancient treasure as he chases the legend of Queen Boudica, the legendary Celtic queen who nearly defeated the invading Roman army 2,000 years ago.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Metal Library
programme.desc: Josh travels through the jungles of Ecuador to explore the watery depths of Tayos Cave for a legendary set of metal plates believed to be created by an advanced ancient civilization.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mahogany Ship
programme.desc: Josh searches for the missing Mahogany ship along Australia’s infamous Shipwreck Coast.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Plummer's Gold
programme.desc: Josh sets off for gold rush country to search for the lost fortune of a notorious Montana sheriff. During his investigation, Josh explores hidden cave systems and blows open a mine that's been sealed for over a century.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: A Family Divided
programme.desc: The Plath family has seen some major changes recently, they left the farm and moved into town, Micah and Moriah fled the nest, and Ethan and Olivia cut ties with Kim and Barry. Although they all live within a mile, the distance has never been so great.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: My Mystery Man
programme.desc: Micah reunites with model-friend Helena for a very hot and steamy modeling session. Barry and Isaac try to talk about the birds and the bees. Lydia reveals she has a secret crush, and Moriah goes on her first date ever.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: You Can't Stop the Girl
programme.desc: Ethan is left speechless after Olivia gets a body piercing. Ethan and Olivia host Micah and Moriah for their first ever Independence Day. Kim, Barry and the kids head back to the farm to welcome visitors from down under.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: Open to Falling in Love
programme.desc: Ethan and Olivia realize that in order to save their marriage and sanity, they need to move farther away from Kim and Barry. Moriah's relationship with Max is in jeopardy, and Micah faces financial stress after he wrecks his car on the eve of a hot date.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Safer at Home
programme.desc: While isolated at home due to the spread of Covid-19, Whitney struggles with her growing resentment toward Chase.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: My Big Fat Broken Heart
programme.desc: After months of quarantine and struggling with panic attacks, Whitney is still reeling after hearing that Chase is having a baby with another woman. She turns to Buddy for comfort.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: Friend or Boyfriend?
programme.desc: Moriah decides that it's time to keep her promise to Max, and she introduces him to her family. Ethan and Olivia continue to mend their marriage, but Olivia is crushed when she hears some disappointing news.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Christmas Collection 2
programme.desc: Follow four Christmas fanatics as they reveal the amount of time, money and effort they put into their obsessions all year-round.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Safer at Home

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: My Big Fat Broken Heart

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: Friend or Boyfriend?
programme.desc: Moriah decides that it's time to keep her promise to Max, and she introduces him to her family. Ethan and Olivia continue to mend their marriage, but Olivia is crushed when she hears some disappointing news.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Christmas Collection 2
programme.desc: Follow four Christmas fanatics as they reveal the amount of time, money and effort they put into their obsessions all year-round.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: 30,000 Dirty Diapers
programme.desc: The Waldrops are feeling a little cramped in their mobile home as construction starts on their house. Courtney wants to combine nine birthdays and potty train six toddlers.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Mobile Home for the Holidays
programme.desc: This Christmas, the Waldrops aren't decking the halls -- they're going stir-crazy inside the mobile home walls! They have to get a tree, visit Santa and try to keep Christmas special for the kids. Courtney also opens up about her postpartum hair loss.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Surprise, Surprise!
programme.desc: Tumi lost 175 lbs. and has a special guest waiting for her: Jillian Michaels. Megan leaves the salon for a surprise proposal and a trip.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I Wanna Be Naked
programme.desc: Alexis wants to look naked on her wedding day, and Courtney's last-minute indecision puts Randy to the test.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Divas on the Defense
programme.desc: Bride Jenny and her fashion diva bridesmaid battle over to wear or not to wear lace. Gretchen comes back to the salon to try on her custom-made gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Good News, Bad News
programme.desc: ABC News bride Linsey searches to find her perfect wedding gown, but everything her entourage chooses fails to live up to her own expectations. Bride Tessie wants to be a princess on her wedding day.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: A Trio of Options
programme.desc: Bride Katy brought along her stylish Aunt Kristin to shop. Bride Genine falls in love with a dress but her sort-of-psychic friend isn't sure. Meanwhile Monte helps bride Gretchen tailor her dress to perfection.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: 88 and Out at the Gate
programme.desc: Lori and Monte head to Nashville to help country artist Jimmy Stanley with a surprise proposal to fellow country singer Kristen Kelley. She also gets another surprise from Lori and Monte that she never sees coming.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Missy and Nicole
programme.desc: Missy plans to get 700 toothbrushes and other supplies to donate to a center that helps teen moms. Former marine and single mom Nicole can keep her daughter in dance lessons because of couponing.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Judy and Faatima
programme.desc: Faatima is couponing in order to move her family out of their dangerous neighbourhood in Detroit. Judy uses couponing to help her family and friends.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: J'aime and Tiffany
programme.desc: J'aime plans to use her coupons to get nearly $2000 worth of groceries for her $100 budget.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Erin and Dominique
programme.desc: Erin tries to get a haul worth over $2,000 for free, but her unorganized method may be her downfall.

programme.title: Skin Tight: Transformed: Rafael and Anna
programme.desc: Rafael lost over 500-lbs through diet and exercise, but now his excess skin is a huge hindrance on his life and progress. Anna lost 330-lbs, but her low self-esteem is holding her back from being the mother she wants to be.

programme.title: Skin Tight: Transformed: Ronnie, Michael and Renee
programme.desc: Sweet couple Ronnie and Michael Robinette are thriving to live the life they've work so hard for, but their extra skin is in their way. At 64, Renee's excess skin inhibits her from enjoying her relationship and expressing her true self in public.

programme.title: Skin Tight: Transformed: Melanie and Lauren
programme.desc: After losing 350lbs, Melanie wants to just feel normal and date but her layers of skin are dragging her down. Lauren, once over 400lbs and now 158lbs, is so uncomfortable in her excess skin that she can't have the normal life she wants with her boyfriend.

programme.title: Skin Tight: Transformed: Mikki and Denise
programme.desc: After losing 275lbs, Mikki became a fitness fanatic, but the weight loss left her with a lot of sagging skin. Denise's obesity always made her feel invisible, but after losing 200lbs the skin still hinders her from fitting in with her outgoing family.

programme.title: Movie: We're the Millers

programme.title: Movie: Sweet Home Alabama
programme.desc: A designer's plans to remarry are threatened when her first husband refuses to divorce her.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Tongue-tied
programme.desc: Tensions erupt between Jade and Sean at Kloie's birthday dinner. Leah attempts virtual learning with all three girls. Kailyn navigates a medical issue with Creed. Briana tries to put aside her anger with Devoin for Nova's birthday.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Scooba and Renae
programme.desc: Scooba fell hard for Renae on a virtual social app, but soon after marrying her avatar she vanished. Now 6 years later, Renae has returned to rekindle the romance, but can Nev and Kamie track down Scooba's elusive digital love.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Alante and Nevaeh

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dark Side of the Moon

programme.title: Yukon Men: From the Ashes
programme.desc: After Alaska's largest wildfire ravages Tanana, the villagers must adapt their subsistence lifestyles to a new, even harsher reality. Two young homesteaders embark upon a dangerous journey in the hopes of starting a new life on the Cosna.

programme.title: Yukon Men: No Man's Land
programme.desc: After the devastating fire, villagers must modify traditional techniques if they are to survive the winter. A young couple arrives at their remote homestead to discover a life more challenging than they ever imagined.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Desperate Measures
programme.desc: Rebuilding after the fire sets everyone back. Charlie needs all his native wisdom to supply his family this winter. Pat Moore gambles big, trading a prize sled dog for a handful of goats. Stan needs James' lumber to help rebuild his cabin.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Drive to Survive
programme.desc: With a brutal winter taking hold, Chris and Jessi struggle to stay warm and in Rampart, Charlie digs deep into his bag of tricks. Stan and Joey build a monster truck to help rebuild Tozi cabin.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Wild Life: A Race Against Time
programme.desc: As a new normal emerges from the global pandemic, the Wolfpack prepares a medieval-themed birthday celebration for baby Eli. Then, time quickly dwindles as the family races to save their beloved animals from the raging wildfires on Mount Palmer.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Dog Days of Winter
programme.desc: Charlie Wright fights to save Tanana's water supply with help from fellow villager, Stan Zuray. Chris Morse's father, Stuart, returns to the homestead he established forty years ago to help build a key piece of infrastructure.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Escape Plan
programme.desc: A storm destroys the Morses' supply of food, turning their Alaskan dream into a nightmare. Charlie Wright leaves Tanana to build a new trapline far from the reach of outsiders. Stan Zuray builds a survival shelter for a dicey stretch of the new road.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Wild Life: A Race Against Time
programme.desc: As a new normal emerges from the global pandemic, the Wolfpack prepares a medieval-themed birthday celebration for baby Eli. Then, time quickly dwindles as the family races to save their beloved animals from the raging wildfires on Mount Palmer.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Dog Days of Winter
programme.desc: Charlie Wright fights to save Tanana's water supply with help from fellow villager, Stan Zuray. Chris Morse's father, Stuart, returns to the homestead he established forty years ago to help build a key piece of infrastructure.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Escape Plan
programme.desc: A storm destroys the Morses' supply of food, turning their Alaskan dream into a nightmare. Charlie Wright leaves Tanana to build a new trapline far from the reach of outsiders. Stan Zuray builds a survival shelter for a dicey stretch of the new road.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Aftermath
programme.desc: As floodwaters surge, threatening the village, valuable driftwood is left flowing in the wake. James takes to the river to stock up, but his own son turns his back on him. Joey also races upriver, but ends up stranded. Pat hires a helper from New Zealand.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Season of Change
programme.desc: Pat is faced with tough financial choices when he finds out his newly handicapped wife is returning home. Sensing weakness, James strategizes to bring Pat's kennel down. Stan is forced to make a life-changing decision. Bob decides to leave Tanana.

programme.title: The Vet Life: California Dreamin'
programme.desc: The doctors battle it out to determine who will go to a vet conference in San Diego. Dr. Ross treats a kinkajou nearing his terrible twos, while Dr. Blue rids a Min Pin of drop dead breath. Dr. Lavigne suspects a cat is oozing with a contagious disease.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Little Dog, Big Problem
programme.desc: Dr. Blue uncovers a big problem for a paralyzed Yorkie. Dr. Ross takes care of a pair of roosters involved in a barnyard braw, before joining Dr. Lavigne on a hyena consultation.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Fly, Miss Thang, Fly
programme.desc: Dr. Ross examines a barred owl that was hit by a car, but hopes to fly again. Jamie Bell, a dog who hasn't eaten in days, is hiding a secret, a big, fluffy secret. The docs visit an animal rescue center and get up close with some Texas wildlife.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Doctor Dads
programme.desc: Dr. Ross starts off the day with a trio of mischievous ferrets suffering from a skin condition. Bella, a 9-year-old Shepherd, is diagnosed with an extremely large tumor, and her family is faced with difficult decisions throughout her treatment.

programme.title: Animal Cops: Houston: Cat Hoarding House
programme.desc: Animal Cruelty Investigators tackle one of their biggest ever hoarding cases when they uncover over 120 cats inside a quiet suburban house living in atrocious conditions.

programme.title: Animal Cops: Houston: Truck Dragged Pony
programme.desc: A horrific case of road rage leaves a miniature Shetland pony with terrible dragging injuries. While Houston SPCA vets work on treating the pony, the cruelty teams pursue justice for him.

programme.title: Animal Cops: Houston: Abandoned Hero
programme.desc: A shocking case of neglect turns into a threatening standoff; a case of abandonment leaves a dog and some cats living in total squalor.

programme.title: Animal Cops: Houston: Justice Served
programme.desc: Investigator Barbara Christenson makes sure that justice is served for a neglected horse. The owner is sent to jail and ordered to live on a diet of only bread and water.

programme.title: Animal Cops: Houston: Human Trafficking Operation
programme.desc: The SPCA staff partners with law enforcement after a raid to set illegal immigrants free that were held by gunmen. The team begins to remove hundreds of chickens from the dangerous crime scene.

programme.title: Animal Cops: Houston: Hoarder Apartment
programme.desc: An angry animal hoarder refuses to give up all her animals to the Houston SPCA leading to a tense situation. Law enforcement at the scene go to desperate lengths to try and save an exhausted pregnant cat suffering in the extreme heat of the Texas summer.

programme.title: Movie: Daddy's Little Girls
programme.desc: A poor mechanic falls in love with his successful attorney while he fights for custody of his three daughters to protect them from an abusive mother. He must now protect his children and not let the love of his life slip away.

programme.title: Movie: Boo! A Madea Halloween
programme.desc: Madea and her friends are asked to watch her great-niece on Halloween. As the night goes on they are plagued by supernatural events. Madea has to keep the teens out of trouble while fending off a number of paranormal threats like ghosts and zombies.

programme.title: Movie: Madea's Family Reunion
programme.desc: While planning a family reunion, Madea finds herself plagued by family trouble, including her sister's death, a niece's wedding to a handsome, but abusive man and a troubled and angry court appointed ward.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Man and the Mouse
programme.desc: Will and Sasha look at moving away due to their lack of privacy, and its man versus mouse.

programme.title: Movie: Noah

programme.title: Movie: Vampire Academy
programme.desc: A teenage human-vampire hybrid trains at a special school to protect the Moroi: a line of peaceful, mortal vampires, of which her best friend is one. Aware of a growing threat within the Academy, the two plan to make their escape.

programme.title: Movie: Red 2
programme.desc: A team of retired C.I.A operatives reunite in an attempt to track down a nuclear device that has gone missing.

programme.title: Movie: Death Wish
programme.desc: Dr. Kersey is no stranger to holding people's lives in his hands, but after his wife and daughter are brutally attacked during a home invasion he begins taking lives instead of saving them. He becomes a vigilante who hunts the city's worst criminals.

programme.title: Movie: Noah
programme.desc: An uncommonly righteous man receives apocalyptic visions of a coming deluge and is instructed to build an enormous wooden ark, which will carry his family and all of Earth's animal life safely through the flood.

programme.title: Movie: The Purge
programme.desc: A family is held hostage for harbouring the target of a murderous syndicate during the Purge, a period in which any and all crime is legalized.

programme.title: Futurama: Viva Mars Vegas
programme.desc: In order to recover stolen goods from the Robot Mafia, the crew stages a casino heist.

programme.title: Futurama: 31st Century Fox
programme.desc: Bender gets hunted down after he saves a robotic fox from hunters.

programme.title: Futurama: Naturama
programme.desc: Bender and the others are transformed into wild animals in a nature documentary.

programme.title: Futurama: 2-D Blacktop
programme.desc: Professor Farnsworth joins a gang of street-racing punks.

programme.title: Futurama: Fry and Leela's Big Fling
programme.desc: Fry and Leela's romantic vacation goes disturbingly wrong.

programme.title: Movie: Jigsaw
programme.desc: Over a decade after the notorious Jigsaw Killer died, murder victims who were all killed in unique and gruesome ways begin turning up around the city, each bearing his distinct mark. For the victims already in the killer's grasp, help may come too late.

programme.title: Movie: The Circle
programme.desc: A young woman takes the opportunity of a lifetime to work at the world's most powerful technology company. When she joins a ground-breaking experiment, she finds it pushes the boundaries of privacy and ethics, and will affect the lives of everyone.

programme.title: Movie: Skyfall
programme.desc: The charming James Bond faces another challenging situation as M deals with her power being threatened. Past events are revealed, as James Bond is possibly the only agent able to help M through this troubling time as action-packed attacks wage on.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab: Roof-raising Race for Space
programme.desc: Alison and Donovan are back in Chicago's Bucktown neighbourhood, where they find a Civil War-era house on a corner lot with only 1,200 square feet of living space.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Historic Home Overhaul
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny Marrs transform the a family's historic, 1893 house. From turning an attic space into two bedrooms to completely renovating the kitchen and living area, they pull out all the stops to give the family of five their first home.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: A Home to Love
programme.desc: A woman made an offer on a 1902 house, and her husband thinks it’s too outdated. Dave and Jenny work to renovate it while preserving its original charm.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Old Dojo to Modern Mojo
programme.desc: A couple bought a karate studio as an investment property but when life threw them a curveball, they decided to downsize. With Dave and Jenny's help, they want to transform the commercial space into a home complete with industrial and modern charm.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Life on Marrs: A Bigger Kitchen for a Growing Family
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny reveal details behind the making of the episode and share fun facts as they overhaul an expecting couple's outdated, 1970s home into a space that feels welcoming for their growing family.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: She Said 'Yes!'

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Confessions of a Beauty Queen
programme.desc: With Savannah and Chase leaving the nest in the next few years, Todd and Julie decide it's time to downsize.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chase Turns 18

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Anger Management
programme.desc: Todd blames his family for his stress when his doctor tells him that he has high blood pressure. Savannah gives Todd more bad news. Nothing works until Todd finds his own way to relieve his stress, leaving the kids running for cover.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: California Chrisleys
programme.desc: The Chrisleys venture to LA for their regular Beverly Hills haircuts, and for what Todd hopes will be a relaxing family vacation. His plans and sanity are threatened by new levels of Chrisley family craziness when Savannah does something drastic.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Workin' for a Livin'
programme.desc: After Todd unknowingly foots the bill for an extravagant lunch, he wants Chase and Savannah to learn that money doesn't grow on trees. Forced to get summer jobs, the kids struggle to face the reality of a hard day's work for the first time.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Great Outdoors

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Marriage Redux

programme.title: Counting Cars: You Never Forget Your First Z28, Part Two
programme.desc: Danny's battle with nightmare Z28 continues as he puts it through endless fabrication to bring it back to life. When the client comes to pick it up, Danny will finally learn if it was worth all the trouble.

programme.desc: Danny and the team are commissioned to restore a 1941 Triumph motorcycle back to its World War II-era glory. Even with a $50,000 budget, the project turns into one of the biggest challenges in Count's Kustoms history.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Tricked Out Triumph

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery in Mustang

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: What Happened To The Beauty Queen?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery in Payson Canyon
programme.desc: Kay Mortensen took pride in preparing for every possible threat, so when he was found dead at home, those who knew him were stunned. The brutal killing put two of Kay's loved ones behind bars and in danger.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: The fire broke out before dawn. After the smoke cleared, a mother of two young children was found dead. It was the tragic end to a life that held so much promise, but for investigators, it was just the beginning.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Toxic

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Murder on Nantucket Island

programme.title: Cold Justice: Bound and Burnt

programme.title: Cold Justice: Pain in Pawhuska

programme.title: Cold Justice: Death Among Him

programme.title: Cold Justice: Death Among Him

programme.title: Unearthed: Tower of Babel: The New Evidence
programme.desc: The Tower of Babel is one of the most famous stories of the Bible, and to find out if it really existed, archaeologists use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate how ancient engineers could have built such an extraordinary megastructure.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Osiris
programme.desc: A camera captures a person inexplicably bursting into flames. An ancient statue at a museum appears to come to life at night. An alien-like creature is filmed in the sewers. Eerie lights caught on camera may explain a mysterious death.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Night of the Chupacabra
programme.desc: A camera captures footage of a Chupacabra-like beast. At an observatory on Hawaii's Mauna Kea, cameras record a mysterious explosion that looks like a nuclear bomb detonated in space. Video of spontaneous combustion is taken at a haunted bar.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Monster Spider
programme.desc: A massive spider's web takes over a park, leading experts to investigate if this monstrous trap could capture a human. A tree spurts out thick red blood, and some believe it could be an undiscovered species of carnivorous plant.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Beast That Ate Jaws
programme.desc: When a shark is eaten by a mysterious predator, experts wonder if a prehistoric monster is to blame. A sinister sight is caught on tape near Russia's Area 51, and the evidence might point to a cover-up.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Mayan Treasure
programme.desc: An explorer searching for treasure at a Mayan sacrificial site is attacked by a mysterious underwater fog. Thousands of fish spontaneously jump to their deaths. Something alien appears over the skies of Lost Angeles.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Man Who Laid an Egg
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a man who appears to lay an egg, some experts wonder if it's evidence that scientists created a human-reptile mutant through gene manipulation. Using cutting-edge tech, investigators put this horrifying theory to the test.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Black Powder Blast
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet experts of the battlefield who recreate black powder blasts from the Civil War, and using cutting-edge technology, they experiment with this simple yet deadly explosive.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Fighting Fire with Fire
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet the expert firefighters who use cutting-edge explosive technology to battle dangerous infernos, and using the latest science, they'll find if the best antidote to fire is more fire.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Fireworks Declassified
programme.desc: Go behind-the-scenes at one of the world's largest fireworks companies, and reveal the explosive secrets and cutting-edge innovations of its world-class pyrotechnics experts.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Blowing Up Hollywood
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy go behind-the-scenes at a premier Hollywood special effects company to reveal the secrets of the world's greatest movie explosions and how cutting-edge tech pushes cinematic carnage to new heights.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: FBI Bomb Squad
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet experts from the FBI's bomb squad to reveal the cutting-edge forensics and technology required to investigate deadly bomb threats and neutralize them.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: When Mountains Explode
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet experts using cutting-edge explosives to turn entire mountains into gravel-sized bits essential for construction, and their investigation reveals the high-powered, hi-tech process behind this dangerous work.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Shadow of Death
programme.desc: A woman calls 911, whispering that intruders broke into her home, bound her and her son, and attacked her husband. Police arrive and find the husband dead and the killers gone. Investigators struggle to expose the twisted mastermind behind the crime.

programme.title: Murder Calls: The Silencer
programme.desc: With the help of a neighbor, an injured woman calls 911 saying an intruder broke into her boyfriend's home and shot them both. Police respond and find the boyfriend executed. Cops must decipher strange evidence left behind to identify the killer.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Run for Your Life
programme.desc: In a remote town in Oklahoma, Amanda Burney and her fiancée Ethan Walton are out running an errand that quickly becomes a run for their lives.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Get Out
programme.desc: Young love leads fifteen-year old high school standout Jessica Keen down an increasingly rebellious path that culminates in a night of grave and unfathomable terror in rural Madison County, Ohio.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Creek Bottom
programme.desc: College student and aspiring teacher Tammy Crowe has everything to live for, but on her way to a friend's dinner party, Tammy's life takes an unexpectedly devastating and violent turn.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Open 24 Hours
programme.desc: To pay for college, Donna Ferres takes a job working the overnight shift at a local convenience store. But after a familiar face walks into the store one night, her routine shift takes a sick and twisted turn.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Farmer's Daughter
programme.desc: Bubbly college student and waitress, Mindy Morgenstern, is found strangled and stabbed in her own apartment. Family, friends, and the entire town of Valley City, North Dakota help law enforcement identify who could have committed this violent crime.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Ashes to Alibis
programme.desc: Residents of Post Falls, Idaho, are shocked when devoted family man Bo Kirk vanishes, and his truck is found set ablaze. Bo's sister blames their estranged father, until released ATM security footage suggests a co-worker with piercing blue eyes.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Open 24 Hours
programme.desc: To pay for college, Donna Ferres takes a job working the overnight shift at a local convenience store. But after a familiar face walks into the store one night, her routine shift takes a sick and twisted turn.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Farmer's Daughter
programme.desc: Bubbly college student and waitress, Mindy Morgenstern, is found strangled and stabbed in her own apartment. Family, friends, and the entire town of Valley City, North Dakota help law enforcement identify who could have committed this violent crime.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Branches of Evil
programme.desc: Tray Phelps, a beloved father, son and fiancée was found beaten to death in his own driveway. The small town of Hayti, Missouri is stunned to discover that a web of evil lurks just beneath the surface of the seemingly idyllic hamlet.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Run for Your Life
programme.desc: In a remote town in Oklahoma, Amanda Burney and her fiancée Ethan Walton are out running an errand that quickly becomes a run for their lives.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Murder on the Reservation
programme.desc: On the northern Cheyenne Indian reservation, a young mother goes missing after the Fourth of July. When her body is discovered in the woods, the victim's family dig through the memories of their loved one to provide investigators with critical clues.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Murdered in the Cold of Winter
programme.desc: In the quiet town of Stamping Ground, Kentucky, the dead body of a young woman is found late at night by her brother and father. When detectives learn the victim was pregnant, they consider it a motive for murder and begin a homicide investigation.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: The Devil Made Me Do It
programme.desc: A father of three is murdered in his own home, stabbed 32 times with an X carved into his neck.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Death in the Family
programme.desc: Randy Scheffield's family finds him dead in his bed, and their first thought is a heart attack. But detectives will slowly uncover a murder conspiracy that will rock this small town for years to come...

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Murder by the Book
programme.desc: In 1988, a Burbank couple is shot in their own home – husband Dan Montecalvo survives, but wife Carol dies in the hospital. The investigation will reveal a dubious past, and a scheming killer who almost got away with the perfect murder.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Jump Shot
programme.desc: Hollywood 'golden boy' Gavin Smith, a 20th Century Fox executive and former star UCLA basketball player goes missing. For years, his family and detectives search tirelessly for answers, but a group of heartless characters holds fast to their secrets.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Reality Kills
programme.desc: Erin Moriarty investigates whether an Atlanta police detective botch an alleged murder investigation because television cameras were rolling.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Natalie Wood: Death in Dark Water
programme.desc: Nearly four decades after the unexplained drowning death of Hollywood star Natalie Wood, Los Angeles County Sheriff's Investigators speak for the first time and tell '48 Hours' that her then-husband, actor Robert Wagner, is now a person of interest.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Stranger Online
programme.desc: 13-year-old Nicole Lovell signed on to the Kik messaging app looking for a friend, and instead became the victim of an anonymous online predator. Peter Van Sant reports.

programme.title: American Monster: Looks Can Kill
programme.desc: When mysterious and beautiful Rebecca Thudin meets the dashing Larry Fenton, a whirlwind romance is sparked. The rich, successful pair seem to be a match made in heaven, until a murder exposes a tangled web of lies, deceit and buried secrets.

programme.title: American Monster: Wave to Daddy
programme.desc: The daughter of one of America's most notorious killers gives an exclusive interview, taking us on a journey into the eyes of a cold-blooded monster. Never-before-seen footage reveals the devastating double life of a murderer and his horrific crimes.

programme.title: American Monster: Flesh and Blood
programme.desc: Young parents Adriene and James Magee work hard to provide a stable life for their three small children in rural Louisiana. But underneath the idyllic scenes lurks a dark secret, culminating in a heinous double-murder at the hands of a loved-one.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: The story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons
programme.desc: The dark history of America's Secret Prisons is revealed.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican is a secretive, watchful institution that protects its reputation and the members of its ranks with fierce, often reckless abandon. The secrets and scandals throughout its history are some of the darkest.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The UFO Cover-Up
programme.desc: Discover the truth behind the UFO cover up. Attempt to discover if there is a hidden 'shadow government' that guards the truth, even from the President.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Lockerbie Plot
programme.desc: An inquiry into whether Iran was really behind the Lockerbie Bombing, if the CIA invented and promoted suicide bombing in the Middle East, why there were no photos of Bin Laden's body and if 9/11 was actually an inside job.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons

programme.title: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: The story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bass Reeves: The Real Lone Ranger
programme.desc: Bass Reeves is no ordinary lawman. A slave set free by the Civil War, he hunts outlaws in the most dangerous territory in the nation. There is striking evidence that this fearless, legendary rider is the basis for the iconic character of the Lone Ranger.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bill Doolin and The Oklahombres
programme.desc: In the 1890s, the Frontier had vanished, but in Bill Doolin, its spirit burned on. He terrorized Oklahoma with his brazen robberies and fought the greatest shootout in Western history.

programme.title: Mafia vs. JFK
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroys his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Headquarters
programme.desc: In this episode, Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil, to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Fighting Forces
programme.desc: Learn about some of the greatest fighting forces in history.

programme.title: Weaponology: Tanks
programme.desc: Uncover the killer genes in the tank's family tree.

programme.title: Shadow Ops: Codeman: Trigon
programme.desc: Martha Peterson is a CIA secret weapon, operating as a woman in the man's world of espionage in Cold War Moscow. TRIGON is a KGB turncoat, ready to hand over top secret intelligence to bring down the Soviet Union from within.

programme.title: Shadow Ops: Reagan's Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Vladimir Vetrov was a top KGB spy until he betrayed his country and became a secret agent for the West. Codenamed 'Farewell' he would become America's single greatest asset in the US-Soviet spy war.

programme.title: Shadow Ops: Escape From Moscow
programme.desc: KGB Colonel turned double agent Oleg Gordievsky has spent ten years spying for Britain's secret service, MI6. Now the Soviets are on to him. His only hope for survival is to attempt a daring exfiltration plan.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Piney Woods Place
programme.desc: Cat Taylor constructs a remote sanctuary for her and her husband in the woods of Northwest Texas. The two-story home is made from sand, clay and straw.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Lighthouse
programme.desc: After witnessing the demise of Casco Bay's Halfway Rock lighthouse, Ford Reiche has the chance to return this icon to its former glory. It will take barges full of scaffolding, masons, and the cooperation of Mother Nature.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: Michael Reynolds is an architect and visionary that created the Earthship. Earthships are houses that are completely self-sufficient and totally off the grid with no electricity or water bills - ever.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: West Coast Island Getaway
programme.desc: Building pro Mark Smith builds an off-grid modular home high up on a cliff off the coast of Vancouver, Canada. Everyone's on their toes and working as carefully as possible as even the smallest mistake could result in the home crashing down.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Carolina Catamaran
programme.desc: A couple of pro builders construct an upcycled off-grid homestead deep in the sprawling South Carolina islands. Plans for the catamaran-style home include a luxury yacht aesthetic, but the couple must build during hurricane season to meet their deadline.

programme.title: Grand Designs: Unbelievable Builds: One-of-a-kind Tiny House
Building Off the Grid: Montana Mountain Modern
programme.desc: A father-son duo builds an off-grid home in Montana's Flathead Valley. The 720-square-foot stick-frame home takes advantage of the mountain winds using a wind-turbine generator for power and features plenty of upcycled materials from the surrounding area.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Family Builds
programme.desc: For some off-grid builders, it's family first. But when family is on the line, the stakes are even higher. From an artsy mountain abode to an Ozark container paradise, these builds are sure to create a lifetime of family memories.

programme.desc: Brock and Chase are giving a lake house some much needed updates. They get rid of the rubber flooring, carpet and dated accordion door. Brock creates a one of a kind artwork, made of barnwood. He adds sliding barn doors to give the home some rustic charm.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: A Cottage in the Woods
programme.desc: The second project of the season finds Norm and Kevin back on Cape Ann in the scenic riverside town of Essex, Massachusetts. Homeowners John and Julie Corcoran who are hoping to turn their English-style cottage into an accessible in-law residence.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Human Centered Design, Demolition
programme.desc: Site work is done so the doorways can be level with the ground. Unsafe framing on the second floor is revealed in demolition. Footings are in progress on the kitchen bump out. Architect Sally DeGan shares the accessible homes aren't institutional.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: One-Level Living
programme.desc: With the main framing complete, Tom shows Kevin water damage to the house and how it's repaired and prevented. Landscape architect Jade Cummings shows Kevin the side patio design for ease of entry, dramatic effect and proper drainage.

programme.title: Restored: 1930 Simple Spanish Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett helps a recently-divorced mom who is in over her head with her cute Spanish bungalow in Riverside, California. He opts for a simplistic approach in his restoration of the exterior areas and kitchen.

programme.title: Restored: 1927 Arts and Crafts Bungalow
programme.desc: A daughter and mother call on Brett to restore a 1927 arts and crafts house that's lost some character over the years. While restoring the home, Brett unexpectedly discovers a hidden masterpiece.

programme.title: Restored: 1918 Arts and Crafts Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett Waterman helps a young family with two small children restore their home after a failed attempt to restore it themselves. The house has been in the family for generations so Brett's eye for historical accuracy is much needed.

programme.title: Restored: The 1890 Yellow Shingle-Style Victorian
programme.desc: Brett strips away strange remodels and restores the beauty and functionality to a 1890s Victorian.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Generations Of Smoke
programme.desc: Barbecue is in the blood at two family-run institutions where the dedication for perfecting smoked meats spans decades.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Out Of This World Bbq
programme.desc: Roger meets a pit master with a PhD who cooks Carolina-style whole hog barbecue in Louisiana. Dr. Howard Conyers is an engineer for NASA by day, but a pit master at night.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Southern Sizzle and Smoke
programme.desc: At a non-profit organization to support veterans in Georgia, Roger Mooking helps cook a whole mutton and slow-roast veggies for a cookout. At Bob Sykes Bar-B-Q in Bessemer, AL, he loads 250 pounds of salted pork into a 15-foot pit.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Red-Hot Roasts
programme.desc: Roger visits two caterers in the South who specialize in live-fire cookouts. He starts in Chattanooga, Tennessee where Argentinian grill master Mariano Cebrián has an incredible collection of portable rigs to create fantastical live-fire events.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: Miami
programme.desc: In Miami, Eddie Hall's first stop is a seafood spot for a fresh fried-fish sandwich. Then, Eddie sets his sights at a shooting range before heading to Anna Maria Island, FL, to take on a monster dish of rib-eye steak, pork ribs, lobster and shrimp.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: Queens
programme.desc: Stoke strongman Eddie Hall visits cosmopolitan Queens, NY, to make a solo attempt at a huge Greek kebab banquet, sample the best Chinese dumplings and try his hand at baseball.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Detroit, Michigan
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventure brings him to Detroit for the famous Detroit-style, Sicilian square pan pizza.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Cleveland, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's food frenzy brings him to Cleveland, Ohio, for a corned beef colossus, a caramel ice cream sundae at a sweet time machine and an Olympic-sized gyro in the Greek Village Grille's Mount Olympus Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manhattan
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty trek brings him to Manhattan for historic pizza-by-the-slice, a transcendent take on an Old World baked good and over five pounds of undefeated dessert in the Giant Ice Cream Scoop Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Washington, DC
programme.desc: Adam's hunger takes him to Washington, DC, to 'Horace and Dickie's' and 'Ben's Chilli Bowl'.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Most Perfect Pork
programme.desc: Casey's eating odyssey has taken him all over the country and back again, and it's finally time to honour the best of the best. We're counting down the five most perfect pork dishes in Man v. Food history.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Lafayette, Louisiana
programme.desc: Casey Webb's food fling finds him in Lafayette, La., for savoury Cajun stew and a stuffed and spicy sandwich specialty. He also accepts the Devil's Bowl Challenge- a scorching-hot bowl of ramen.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Parm and Polenta Cake Make Everything Better
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes his grilled eggplant parmesan outdoors on the grill and whips up a classic accompaniment with salami and provolone, antipasti salad with campfire dressing.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Meats and Sweets Feel the Heat
programme.desc: Only Michael Symon would think to make Moussaka on the grill, taking the Mediterranean casserole layered with meat, veggies and cheese sauce outside. His wife, Liz, joins him to create a light, complimentary side dish of grilled and steamed artichokes.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked Whole Hog
programme.desc: Michael Symon smokes a whole hog for a juicy pulled pork sandwich in Asheville, North Carolina.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Mountains Of Meat
programme.desc: Michael Symon meets a chef bringing the Indian street food flavors of his childhood to Asheville, N.C., with his own take on a sloppy joe that he calls a Sloppy Jai, with lamb hash and 30 Indian spices.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Barbecue Ribs, Cheese Melts and Cake Balls
programme.desc: Brad Miller travels to Nashville, Tenn., for hickory-smoked baby back ribs with hot, Memphis-style barbecue sauce from the Smoke Et Al food truck and owner Shane Autrey.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Stuffed Arepas, Mac 'n' Cheese and Doughnuts
programme.desc: Brad Miller gets a taste of Venezuelan street food at Arepas House food truck in Denver, Colo., where Chef Jorge Dominguez serves a traditional corncake sandwich filled with marinated flank steak, grilled pork sausage and creamy avocado sauce.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Big Sky, Big Game, Big Flavor!
programme.desc: Ali's expedition for the best deals in Bozeman, Mont., begins with farm-to-table fresh benedict and summer sausage before hunting down a made-from-scratch elk burger.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Mountain Feast
programme.desc: Ali hits the Jackson Hole, Wyo., trail running for a delicious croque madame with mornay sauce in the morning and crosses the Snake River for a crunchy fried chicken banh mi sandwich.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Crossroad Foodie
programme.desc: Ali paves the way in Salt Lake City with a zesty pound cake-inspired French toast, then gets wasted on a burger topped with fried guacamole. A biker bar sends him to heaven with a Utah staple, fried Mormon funeral potatoes.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Great Lakes Craves
programme.desc: Ali Kahn digs into the best deals in Grand Rapids with a twilight French toast glistening with creamy anglaise sauce. For lunch, it's a Mexican fiesta with layers of juicy pork torta de jamon.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations: Australia
programme.desc: Tony is off to discover what makes Melbourne, Australia's cultural capital, so special. Luckily for Tony he has many friends who are going to be taking him to sample the many cuisines offered.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Curacao
programme.desc: Andrew enjoys bold, tropical flavors on the Caribbean island of Curacao.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Queens
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits NYC specifically to scope out Queens' multicultural gastronomy. From hand-ripped noodles to spicy Thai stir-fries, grilled Greek octopus to kosher icons like pastrami on rye.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Alsace
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern discovers the famously French and decidedly German cuisine of Alsace, France.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chicago: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern takes a bite of Chicago's humble, hearty and world-renowned food scene. From juicy rib tips to zesty Polish sausages to experimental and edible works of art, Chicago's eats stay true to its roots.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: The Whole Hog
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson goes hog-wild all day with dishes that use every single part of the pig. Simple strips of bacon for breakfast just won't do, and forget about basic barbecue. These are the perfect porky portions for an entire day of pigging out.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: United Tastes of America
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson is the guide on a mouthwatering trip to sample all the classic, iconic dishes of America. From delicious desserts on the Florida coast to spicy-hot chili in the Lone Star State, this is the best way to experience the USA.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Extra Crispy
programme.desc: We're tracking down the crunchiest, flakiest and noisiest favorite foods in New York.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Big Cheese
programme.desc: Jeff Mauro, Geoffrey Zakarian, Jamika Pessoa and Bobby Flay are just a few of your favorite food personalities sharing their all-time favourite ways to indulge in some cheesy goodness.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Sandwich Hall Of Fame
programme.desc: We're honoring the all-time favorite sandwiches in the 'Sandwich Hall of Fame,' because it's all about the bread and what's in between! If you've never had a BL'G'T, Eddie Jackson will tell you where to go.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Serious Spice
programme.desc: Good food is the spice of life, and we're adding a little kick with our flavor-filled favourites.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Marge Be Not Proud
programme.desc: Bart is caught stealing a video game at a local store and desperately tries to hide this from his parents. When a family portrait is ruined as a result, Marge decides that it is her fault for mothering him too much.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Grift of the Magi
programme.desc: When a private company buys the school, Lisa discovers that it's a top toy company conducting research to design their hot new Christmas toy. Lisa and Bart go to investigate the company but are stymied by its security guard, Gary Coleman.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Kill Gil, Volumes 1 & 2
programme.desc: The family is stuck with an unwanted houseguest after they open their home to Gil for the Christmas holidays. After a full year, an attempt at getting him a job and many failed 'accidents,' Marge finally grows a spine and throws Gil out Christmas Day.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Nightmare After Krustmas
programme.desc: Krusty tries to impress his daughter as they spend Christmas with the Simpsons. Meanwhile, Reverend Lovejoy seeks converts after church attendance plummets, and Maggie is haunted by a spooky Christmas toy.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: A magazine program featuring current events as seen from a Christian perspective, as well as testimonies of changed lives.

programme.title: 700 Club Interactive
programme.desc: Teaching Biblical principles and tackling a variety of topics. Social media is used to minister directly to its audience and encourages viewers to ask questions and send in prayer requests.

programme.title: Movie: The Star
programme.desc: After fleeing captivity, a small but brave donkey makes friends with a lost sheep, a dove and a trio of wisecracking camels. Together, they follow a bright star lighting up the sky and end up becoming accidental heroes in the very first Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: The Santa Clause
programme.desc: When a father mistakenly kills Santa Claus on Christmas Eve, he is magically recruited to take over as Santa. Over the course of the next year, the not-so- jolly man transforms into Santa Claus and works to mend his relationship with his young son.

programme.title: Movie: The Santa Clause 2
programme.desc: After being Santa Claus for many years, Scott Calvin must now find a wife and help his son.

programme.title: Movie: Rampage
programme.desc: A primatologist has a closer bond with George, a friendly gorilla that he's raised since infanthood, than he does with any humans, but when the animal is exposed to a genetic experiment it grows to a massive size and goes on a destructive rampage.

programme.title: Movie: Transformers
programme.desc: The battle between two tribes of alien robots reaches Earth. The giants, buried beneath the Earth's surface for thousands of years, are awakened and learn the key to finding an energy source may lie with a young human.

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite
programme.desc: A world class roster of diverse wrestlers give fans a new wrestling experience.

programme.title: Movie: Ready Player One
programme.desc: After the creator of a virtual reality world dies he leaves a treasure behind in the game that will give control of the virtual world to whoever finds it. An idealistic young man races an evil corporation to be the one who gets to control the future.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Krewe
programme.desc: While Pride listens in on a wiretap of Mayor Hamilton, the NCIS team investigates a train heist of hundreds of Navy weapons.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Knockout
programme.desc: After the Belle Chase Navy Chaplain and pastor at Clearwater Baptist is murdered, Pride believes he found a connection between Mayor Hamilton and the illegal activity taking place in Clearwater. Also, Percy continues to face repercussions from a case.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Down the Rabbit Hole
programme.desc: After Pride is spotted tracking one of Mayor Hamilton's accomplices, the suspect opens fire on a crowded street before disappearing.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Poetic Justice
programme.desc: Unable to trust anyone in New Orleans, the NCIS team calls in FBI Assistant Director Isler to help expose and stop the sinister scheme Mayor Hamilton has planned for the residents of Clearwater.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Rogue Nation
programme.desc: While Pride remains on probation six weeks after his rogue takedown of the corrupt Mayor Hamilton, his team is closely monitored. Also, when the FBI arrives to run lead on a case involving a stolen rig of nuclear waste the team must investigate.

programme.title: Charmed: Is There a Woogy in the House
programme.desc: Phoebe's fear of the 'Woogyman' amuses Prue and Piper, until a shadow demon is released.

programme.title: Charmed: Witch Prue Is It, Anyway?
programme.desc: A warrior comes to town to kill the eldest sibling witch as he did to the sisters' aunt.

programme.title: Charmed: When Bad Warlocks Go Good
programme.desc: Prue meets a young man fighting to be good instead of evil; Phoebe helps Piper.

programme.title: Supernatural: Don't You Forget About Me
programme.desc: Sam and Dean drop in on Jody Mills, Claire and Alex after receiving a panicked phone call.

programme.title: Supernatural: Love Hurts

programme.title: Supernatural: The Vessel
programme.desc: Hoping to find a weapon powerful enough to defeat Amara, Dean convinces Castiel to send him back in time.

programme.title: Bones: The Archaeologist in the Cocoon

programme.title: Movie: Four Christmases
programme.desc: A couple struggles to spend Christmas with all four of their divorced parents when their vacation plans fall through.

programme.desc: A couple struggles to spend Christmas with all four of their divorced parents when their vacation plans fall through.

programme.title: Living Single: In the Black Is Beautiful

programme.title: Movie: 12 Gifts of Christmas
programme.desc: A woman is hired to become a personal shopper for an uptight, corporate executive. As they work together, she teaches him that Christmas has less to do with the money that is spent, and more to do with the people in your life.

programme.title: Movie: The Most Wonderful Time of the Year
programme.desc: A single mother who's lost all interest in Christmas finds just what she needs when her uncle comes to visit.

programme.title: Movie: Sense, Sensibility and Snowmen
programme.desc: A Christmas enthusiast, and her sister, clash with their latest client, a not-so-jolly toy company CEO.

programme.desc: Planning a storybook Christmas with her boyfriend proves challenging for a woman when he goes AWOL. A tempting new romance turns her life upside down.

programme.title: Movie: It's Beginning to Look a Lot Like Christmas
programme.desc: When a New England Christmas decorating competition searches for the town with the most Christmas spirit, the Mayors of East and West Riverton go all out to get their towns to the top of the holiday heap.

programme.title: Movie: Marry Me at Christmas
programme.desc: A bridal boutique owner finds out she'll be working closely with her crush.

programme.title: Movie: A Cheerful Christmas
programme.desc: As a 'Christmas Coach' a woman provides her clients with all the magic of the holidays. In order to make her new clients vision a success, she is tasked with working with their son, to find out all of their holiday traditions.

programme.title: Movie: A Nashville Christmas Carol
programme.desc: A television producer is forced to work with the man who broke her heart on a country music Christmas special while being interrupted by Christmas spirits determined for her to revisit her past.

programme.title: Home and Family

programme.title: Movie: The Sweetest Christmas
programme.desc: A pastry chef makes it to the final round of a renowned baking competition and finds herself asking her high school sweetheart for help. As they grow closer, she realizes the must embrace the Christmas spirit or risk losing a chance at love.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Getaway
programme.desc: A recently single travel writer is forced to share a cabin due to a mix up on her holiday vacation. What is an annoyance at first quickly changes to a new romance.

programme.title: South Park

programme.title: South Park: Truth and Advertising
programme.desc: PC Principal disappears with two of the fourth-grade students.

programme.title: South Park: PC Principal Final Justice
programme.desc: Kyle has chosen a dangerous alliance over his friendship with Stan.

programme.title: South Park: Reverse Cowgirl
programme.desc: An unspeakable tragedy occurs when one of the boys leaves the toilet seat up.

programme.title: South Park: Elementary School Musical
programme.desc: The boys must embrace the latest fad to hit South Park Elementary or risk their status as the coolest kids in school.

programme.title: South Park: AWESOM-O
programme.desc: Cartman plans to learn all of Butters' innermost secrets and then use them against him, by pretending to be Butters' new best friend, a robot named AWESOM-O.

programme.title: South Park: The Passion of the Jew
programme.desc: Kyle finally sees the blockbuster movie 'The Passion of the Christ' and admits that Cartman has been right about the Jewish people all along. Meanwhile, Stan and Kenny travel to Hollywood to get their ticket money refunded from Mel Gibson himself.

programme.title: South Park: Ike's Wee Wee
programme.desc: Mr. Mackey, the school counsellor, is fired and turns to drugs and alcohol. Meanwhile, when the boys find out what it means to be circumcised they try to save Ike from his Bris.

programme.title: South Park: Two Days Before the Day After Tomorrow
programme.desc: After a global warming state of emergency is declared in South Park, the world's largest beaver dam breaks and floods the town of Beaverton. The people of South Park must figure out who they can blame before anyone can be saved in the adjacent town.

programme.title: South Park: The Entity
programme.desc: Mr. Garrison gets fed up with long lines, delayed flights and the airline industry in general and invents his own transportation device. Meanwhile, Kyle tries to ditch his cousin, also named Kyle, who comes to South Park for an extended visit.

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Hankey the Christmas Poo
programme.desc: The kids are practicing their Christmas play when they find out that Kyle doesn't celebrate Christmas. Kyle explains that he celebrates the visit of 'Mr. Hankey, the Christmas Poo' but no one believes him and he is eventually sent to a mental institution.

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Hankey's Christmas Classics
programme.desc: Mr. Hankey introduces 10 musical segments highlighting songs on the 'Mr. Hankey's Christmas Classics' CD. The boys and all of the other South Park characters sing their own songs for the holidays and realize that Christmas is all about the presents.

programme.title: South Park: Jewbilee
programme.desc: Kyle invites Kenny to join him and Ike at Jewbilee, a camp for Jewish kids, where they make various arts and crafts as tribute to the great and powerful Moses.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: Dec 9, 2020

programme.title: South Park: Pinewood Derby
programme.desc: Randy has a plan that will assure Stan a first place trophy in this year's Pinewood Derby. When they accidentally break warp speed, the town is visited and held hostage by an alien gangster.

programme.desc: Facebook is the ultimate weapon for Professor Chaos.
