programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Paris, Puppies and Pranks
programme.desc: As concerns begin to grow over the Coronavirus, Kim and Kourtney head to Paris for the Yeezy season 8 launch. Kris and Corey welcome a new puppy, and Khloé and Scott’s prank on Kris continues taking yet another turn.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Journey to Healing
programme.desc: Scott experiences some troubling health issues and Kim heads to Washington to meet with some formerly incarcerated women. Khloe is determined to cure Kim of her fear of spiders.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Trouble in Palm Springs
programme.desc: After months of tension among the sisters, Kris plans a getaway to Palm Springs for her daughters to bond, but a major fight between Kendall and Kylie derails the trip.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Sister, Sister and a Babymoon
programme.desc: Khloe takes her bestie on one last trip before her due date, but worries that some issues with Malika’s baby daddy might send her friend into early labor. The family deals with the fallout of Kendall and Kylie’s big fight in Palm Springs.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Things Fall Apart: Covid-19
programme.desc: As L.A. prepares for a potential lockdown, Khloe falls ill and worries that she may have Covid-19. Malika goes into labor and cannot bring her support system to the hospital.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Losing it in Lockdown
programme.desc: Kim struggles to balance work life and mom life in quarantine, while Khloe gets creative to keep herself entertained. The family encourages Kendall and Kylie to reconcile after their argument in Palm Springs.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Love Lockdown
programme.desc: Khloe feels pressured to make a decision about her romantic future with Tristan. Scott heads to a treatment center to work on his health, but is betrayed when the facility leaks photos of him.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell: The Prom
programme.desc: The prom is coming and Zack and Slater want Kelly to choose between them.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell: Zack's War
programme.desc: Mr. Belding wants Zack to join the Cadet Corps and help recruit students.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell: Save the Max
programme.desc: Zach and Screech make use of the old radio station in the basement of Bayside High.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell: Driver's Education
programme.desc: Zack is jealous that Slater knows how to drive and sets out to get him in trouble.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell: House Party
programme.desc: While Screech's parents are away attending an Elvis convention, the guys have a party.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell: Blind Dates
programme.desc: Mr. Belding wants Zack to take out his niece to avoid being suspended.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell: Rent-a-Pop
programme.desc: Zack hires an actor to play his dad for Mr. Belding so he won't get in as much trouble.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell: 1-900-Crushed
programme.desc: Zack and Screech decide to invest in a 900-telephone number to make some money.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Take Him to Fresno
programme.desc: Atlanta chef Chad Clevenger and Puerto Rican-born chef Anita Cartagena are prepped and ready to battle it out in the arena. Food Network's Alex Guarnaschelli and actor Ben Rappaport referee this heavyweight fight for the chance to take on Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Chocolate Covered Clash
programme.desc: Chef Michael Voltaggio gets help from an extra special guest, celebrated actress Drew Barrymore, to take down Bobby Flay. They bring in fantastic pastry chefs DaVee Harned and Miriam Rieder Taylor, who have a passion for chocolate.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Chocolate Victory
programme.desc: Bobby Flay brings his A-game when Mexican cuisine chef Katy Smith and Denver chef Jose Guerrero show up with talent to spare. The pressure is on for Iron Chef Michael Symon and Valerie Bertinelli to choose their contender.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Fresh-Squeezed
programme.desc: Michael Symon and Amanda Frietag are ready to make sure Bobby Flay goes home empty-handed. Chef Carrie Eagle soars into the arena to take on Cincinnati stalwart Jose Salazar for a chance to squeeze out a win against Bobby.

programme.title: Holiday Wars: Surprise Holiday Parade
programme.desc: Santa makes a spur-of-the-moment decision to kick off the season by throwing the biggest, craziest holiday parade ever. Raven-Symone hosts as five teams of cake and sugar artists compete to impress judges Shinmin Li and Erin McGinn, showing what might go.

programme.title: Holiday Wars: Santa to the Rescue!
programme.desc: For one magical night, Santa Claus is a hero to all the world's kids. Host Raven-Symone challenges the five teams of cake and sugar artists to imagine what happens outside of the North Pole when Santa steps in to save the day.

programme.title: Holiday Wars: The Great Turkey Escape
programme.desc: Just in time for Thanksgiving, host Raven-Symone challenges five teams of master cake and sugar artists to imagine what happens when all those holiday turkeys decide to make a break for it. Shinmin Li and Erin McGinn judge the daring turkey escapes.

programme.title: Holiday Wars: When Toys Come Alive ... And Go Wild
programme.desc: This year, a little too much holiday magic accidentally brings all the toys to life on Christmas morning. Host Raven-Symone asks the five teams to show judges Shinmin Li and Erin Acevedo what happens when the newly minted toys come alive.

programme.title: Holiday Wars: Critter Christmas
programme.desc: Host Raven-Symone asks the four remaining teams of cake and sugar artists to create the most over-the-top, crazy visions of a Christmas party in the animal kingdom. Shinmin Li and Erin Acevedo judge these wild critter holiday parties.

programme.title: Holiday Wars: North Pole Wedding
programme.desc: Host Raven-Symone challenges the four remaining teams of master cake and sugar artists to imagine the most-romantic wedding the world has ever seen at the North Pole. Judges Shinmin Li and Erin Acevedo decide which team will go home with $25,000.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Southern Rocky Mountain Wolf
programme.desc: The Southern Rocky Mountain wolf hasn't been seen in almost 80 years, but recent cattle attacks spark the possibility that is still exists. Trekking high into the Sierras, Forrest is determined to bring it out of hiding.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Galapagos Giant
programme.desc: Forrest is in the Galapagos seeking the Fernandina Tortoise, an animal that was only seen once, over 100 years ago. The clues are here, along with an abundance of incredibly unique species, raising hopes of a historic discovery.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Caribbean Monk Seal
programme.desc: Forrest sets off on a dangerous, shark-infested search for the extinct Caribbean monk seal. To prove its existence, he and the crew descend into deep waters where they come face-to-face with a giant tiger shark.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Hidden Turtle of Vietnam
programme.desc: In Vietnam, Forrest teams up with a conservation group to save the largest turtle species in the world from extinction. Using cutting edge technology, they attempt to find a suitor for the last and only surviving giant softshell.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Madagascar Dwarf Hippo
programme.desc: Known for being a pint-size version of its African cousin, the Malagasy dwarf hippo has been written off as extinct for 1000 years. Forrest and a local biologist to trek through the bush of Madagascar to prove it still survives.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Ivory Billed Woodpecker of the Bayou
programme.desc: Forrest is determined to find out if the famously reclusive Ivory Billed Woodpecker still exists. The alligator and poisonous snake infested swamps of Louisiana make for a challenging mission, but he is prepared for anything.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Dodo of the North
programme.desc: Forrest travels to the Faroe Islands to look for any trace of the Great Auk. The search takes him through some of the most scenic and rugged terrain he's ever attempted in his passionate search for a large flightless seabird that has been long forgotten.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Formosan Clouded Leopard
programme.desc: Declared extinct only recently, Forrest is tracking clues and eyewitness accounts that suggest that the Formosan Clouded Leopard could still be alive. He treks deep into the jungles of Taiwan where a run-in with a predator might just solve a mystery.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Zanzibar Leopard
programme.desc: Forrest sets out on a history-making expedition in Zanzibar, revealing species that have never before been filmed. He captures evidence that leads to an unforgettable conclusion on the Zanzibar Leopard, an animal that was declared extinct 25 years ago.

programme.title: Home Town: A Doctor in the House
programme.desc: Ben and Erin are eager to welcome a new pediatrician who hopes to settle down with his wife and work in the beautiful community. The couple wants a historical charmer with room to grow and a spacious outdoor area for entertaining.

programme.title: Home Town: Can This House Be Saved?
programme.desc: A young woman whose father died when she was a child inherited her family home, but it has been empty for years. She comes to Ben and Erin to see if the house can be saved with her $120,000 budget or if her money is better spent on another property.

programme.title: UFO Files: Real UFOs
programme.desc: Ever since the military started using sophisticated airplanes, they have sought ways to build an aircraft that can fly undetected, manoeuvre like a helicopter and fly like a jet. The Nazis first pursued the idea of a disc-shaped aircraft.

programme.title: UFO Files: Canada's Roswell
programme.desc: Roswell is one of the most famous UFO cases in United States history and Canada may have a similar case with a verifiable paper trail. On the night of October 4, 1967, dozens of eyewitnesses in Nova Scotia reported UFO sightings.

programme.title: UFO Files: Texas' Roswell
programme.desc: Five years before the Wright Brothers flew at Kitty Hawk, a mysterious airship crashes in the town of Aurora, Texas in 1897. This episode separates fact from fiction as we hunt for the alien graveyard and study the mysterious metal found at the site.

programme.title: UFO Files: Britain's Roswell
programme.desc: Over three nights in December 1980, Air Force personnel stationed at a NATO installation in England witness strange lights in the sky. On the night of the 25th, servicemen come upon a glowing triangular metallic craft in the woods.

programme.title: UFO Files: Brazil's Roswell
programme.desc: A luminous object hovers near the Brazilian island of Colares in the Amazon delta.

programme.title: UFO Files: Beyond The War of The Worlds
programme.desc: Trace H.G. Wells' best-written work beginning with the origins of his story and the amazing broadcast that drove thousands into a panic in 1938. Witness also the second broadcast in 1968 that again drove thousands into a panic street frenzy in Buffalo.

programme.title: UFO Files: Russian Roswell
programme.desc: Welcome to the remote, top-secret military base Kapustin Yar, the Soviet Area 51, where the wreckage from no fewer than eight UFO crash incidents and their occupants were transported and studied between 1945 and 1991.

programme.title: UFO Files: The Day After Roswell
programme.desc: Delve into the aftermath and repercussions of the 1947 Roswell incident.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Mystery of Puma Punku
programme.desc: At nearly 14,000 years old, the ruins of Puma Punku are the oldest and most baffling on the face of the Earth. No one knows who designed and built this complex of sophisticated inter-locking blocks, and then vanished.

programme.desc: Runaways, adventurists, and escape artists, the Pol's have their hands full, between bulls on the loose, and an attempted kitten getaway.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Dr. Fix-It-All
programme.desc: Clients take matters into their own hands and our vets have a slew of do-it-yourself doctoring to repair. As if they're not busy enough at the clinic, Dr. Pol, Diane and Charles embark on some ambitious home improvement projects at the lake house.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Hounds From Hell
programme.desc: Pet adoption is a cause close to Cesar's heart, so he lends his support to rescue dog owners being terrorized by hounds from hell.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Home-Wrecking Hounds
programme.desc: Cesar visits newlyweds whose two dogs are wreaking havoc on their love nest.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Hounded by Fear
programme.desc: Cesar helps dog-fearing humans overcome their phobias and overcome their anxiety when they're around dogs.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Homeboys and Hounds
programme.desc: Cesar takes on the challenge of two former gang members and their problem mutts.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: High Anxiety
programme.desc: Cesar takes on three dogs whose obsessions have led to a disquieting life for both the canines and their owners.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Paw and Order
programme.desc: Pol Veterinary Services receives a call about a rescued Saint Bernard in a life-threatening situation.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: It's All Dutch to Me
programme.desc: There's no place like the homeland. Dr. Pol, Diane, and Charles finally embark on a long overdue trip to the Netherlands.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Hooked on a Feline
programme.desc: A three-legged feline is hanging around clinic, and he's here to stay!

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Happy Birthday to Moo!
programme.desc: This week, animals are ailing and the doctors are determined. From a potbelly pig to hurt horses and injured cats, it’s as busy a week as ever for the staff at Pol Veterinary Services.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: How to Stop an Assassination
programme.desc: Newly declassified document reveal the details of a top-secret government program created in the wake of the Kennedy assassination to go to extreme lengths to protect the president. A former CIA operative exposes the cutting-edge defenses now in place.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Rise of the Nightstalkers
programme.desc: A former CIA operative investigates new evidence of a top-secret group known as the 'Nightstalkers,' a clandestine team of the world's best aviators involved in the assassination of Osama Bin Laden and other dangerous black ops.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Underwater Ghost Prison
programme.desc: An entrance to the underworld in the American wild, a haunting Soviet underwater prison, and a strange complex of towers in a forest of ice are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Special sneak peek of the new season of Mysteries of the Abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Pompeii's Gate to Hell
programme.desc: An eerie complex of underground tunnels snake beneath a volcano near the ruins of Pompeii, and some believe these passages were intended as a gateway to hell. New discoveries are revealing exactly why they were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Into the Murder Labyrinth
programme.desc: An underground labyrinth once used by a secret police force could warp the mind and turn friend into foe.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of the Castle
programme.desc: Experts investigate the demise of historically flourishing communities: Pablo Escobar's sprawling compound, an elaborate fairy tale estate and a deserted city that was once home to thousands.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Tower of Death
programme.desc: Revealing how an alien Nazi structure that changed history, a strange Soviet monolith known as the Tower of Death, and a concrete ocean giant were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Ghost Park
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Mystery at Alcatraz
programme.desc: Three inmates are said to have escaped from Alcatraz prison, but even today, it's never been proven. New evidence might finally crack this notorious cold case, as experts use forensic science and cutting-edge tech to investigate fresh leads.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Tower of Death
programme.desc: Revealing how an alien Nazi structure that changed history, a strange Soviet monolith known as the Tower of Death, and a concrete ocean giant were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Into the Murder Labyrinth
programme.desc: An underground labyrinth once used by a secret police force could warp the mind and turn friend into foe.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secret History of Pluto
programme.desc: The first close-up images of Pluto revealed the unimaginable secrets of this mysterious frozen world. Now, scientists investigate if Pluto is home to a warm ocean of liquid water beneath its surface, and whether this underground ocean could harbor life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secret World of Nebulas
programme.desc: Nebulas are the strange structures of cosmic gas and dust where stars are born and die, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of these mysterious places.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Edge of the Solar System
programme.desc: Giant magnetic bubbles millions of miles wide, bizarre invisible matter, and a death star tearing through bands of icy comets, flinging them into violent orbits. All this and more could be inside our cosmic backyard, and effecting our lives on Earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Extinction
programme.desc: Asteroids strike, planets collide, black holes blast out death rays, volcanoes erupt and ice engulfs the planet. These are the universe's weapons of extinction. They've happened before - wiping out entire species, and they will happen again.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Milky Way
programme.desc: New research may now be able to answer the question that asks what built the Milky Way. In the very centre of our galaxy is an extremely large black hole that is one of the most destructive objects in the universe. This could possibly be the answer.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Life and Death on the Red Planet
programme.desc: Life once existed on Mars, but a series of devastating mass extinctions have made present-day life nearly impossible. The latest science shows how Martian life keeps bouncing back as it transforms from a blue watery world like Earth into a desert planet.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: Fire in the Cockpit
programme.desc: Some believe the fire on Apollo 1 that killed three astronauts was a top-secret cover-up, and a team of experts investigate if this disaster was a tragic accident or part of a conspiracy to fake the moon landing.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: NASA Nazi Conspiracy
programme.desc: One of America's greatest achievements is also one of its most controversial, and now, a team of experts investigate if there was a conspiracy to fake the moon landing, uncovering a secret report on hundreds of Nazis' involved in the Apollo space program.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: CIA's Secret Space War
programme.desc: Confidential CIA files reveal a top-secret war for space between the US and the Soviets, and a team of experts investigate if new discoveries about American espionage during the Apollo program provide evidence of a conspiracy to fake the moon landing.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: Killing Armstrong
programme.desc: Apollo 11's lunar module nearly killed Neil Armstrong during training, and some believe this close-call could explain a conspiracy to fake the moon landing. A team of experts investigate if dangers that the Apollo 11 crew faced were motive for a cover-up.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: Conspiracy of the Lost Tapes
programme.desc: Experts use cutting-edge tech to hunt for the lost NASA tapes that recorded the Apollo 11 moon landing and shed light on a possible conspiracy, as some believe their disappearance is part of a cover-up to hide the truth.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: The Hollywood Conspiracy
programme.desc: Some believe that the moon's waving American flag is the smoking gun that NASA faked the moon landing, and as a team of experts investigate this strange piece of evidence, the trail leads all the way to some of Hollywood's biggest names.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda and his team investigate the scene of an apparent suicide, only to be forced to flee when they discover the house is booby-trapped. Then Kenda is nearly stumped when a group of teens discover human bones on the outskirts of town.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Fractured Glass
programme.desc: When affable ladies' man Michael Tittemore is gunned down in the dead of night, Kenda first sets his sights on the roommates who were present during the murder. But a shocking revelation will turn his attention to a far more nefarious band of suspects.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Fall From Grace
programme.desc: Hikers come across a horrific scene: a dead man left nude, beaten and bound in the mountain wilderness. But when the young victim's checkered past is uncovered, Kenda must wade through a laundry list of potential suspects to find the man's killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Invisible Hand of Death
programme.desc: Two teens stumble upon a woman engulfed in flames, leaving detectives to wonder just who in her inner circle could kill so cruelly. Then, when a college student is strangled in his home, Lt. Kenda must figure out which of his roommates is lying.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Son Broke My Heart
programme.desc: When Vickie Webb's son warned her the police might come looking for him, she wasn't surprised. He had been getting into trouble, but she sensed this time was different.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: You Don't See Me, I Don't See You
programme.desc: When a charming 33-year-old is gunned down outside his home, detectives must comb over every detail of his personal life, professional dealings, and extracurricular activities to figure out who could commit such a brutal crime, and why.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: We Found Bonnie
programme.desc: In 1993, a family is torn apart when a mother in Jacksonville, Florida goes missing. The case stumps detectives, who believe that the truth about what happened to her is locked inside the mind of the missing woman's three-year-old son.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Is This the Night I Die?
programme.desc: Cindy Best's friends and family all thought she was crazy when she told them her suspicion about her husband, Karl Karlsen. But Cindy was determined to take matters into her own hands and prove her husband was a killer.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: You Don't See Me, I Don't See You
programme.desc: When a charming 33-year-old is gunned down outside his home, detectives must comb over every detail of his personal life, professional dealings, and extracurricular activities to figure out who could commit such a brutal crime, and why.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: We Found Bonnie
programme.desc: In 1993, a family is torn apart when a mother in Jacksonville, Florida goes missing. The case stumps detectives, who believe that the truth about what happened to her is locked inside the mind of the missing woman's three-year-old son.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Soap Star's Secret
programme.desc: Thom Bierdz had finally made it big. When he brought his troubled younger brother out to Los Angeles, he thought he could help set him straight. He never expected that the price he would pay for being wrong would be the life of someone he loved.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Grim Reaper
programme.desc: When Linda found out her biological father was her family friend, Greg Scarpa, she was overjoyed. But when the rest of Greg's bloody secrets came out, Linda learned that being part of his family wasn't just dangerous, it was potentially deadly.

programme.title: Deadly Sins: Vicious Vices
programme.desc: An egomaniac spins his secrets and lies into a deadly web and pride turns a heart to darkness. Then, it's a love triangle with razor sharp edges; with lust and greed feeding the flame, someone will end up in ashes.

programme.title: Deadly Sins: High School Homicide
programme.desc: A high school love triangle tangled up with lust and envy, leads to a plot steeped in horror and tragedy too horrendous to believe. Later, a prideful policeman almost pulls off the perfect murder, until the case resurrects more than two decades later.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Romance Reloaded
programme.desc: High school sweethearts Michelle and Britt rekindle their romance after nearly 20 years apart. But this small-town Georgia family is a far cry from the Brady Bunch, bringing unseen baggage that unleashes a nightmare of infidelity, violence and murder.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Hunting Season
programme.desc: Tammy wins the heart of Larry, and their lives seem perfect. But Tammy starts looks to other men to occupy her time. As Larry grows suspicious, their marriage disintegrates into a high stakes hunt that will leave one dead and the other behind bars.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Death Knows No Borders
programme.desc: Worlds collide when Donald and Umi fall in love in Indonesia. But as Umi strives to become the perfect American woman in Don's native Kentucky, he longs for something or someone more exotic and when this unorthodox family is divided only one can conquer.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Opposites Can Kill
programme.desc: Young single mom Kathy wants a good life for herself and her son. That life soon includes wannabe rap star Juan, who has ambitions of his own. But their dreams clash and tempers erupt when Kathy decides she wants more out of life: no matter what the cost.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: The Wrath of Love
programme.desc: Zach Sanders is being pulled in two directions between the woman he loves and his mistress who refuses to let him go. Jealousy, obsession and news of a surprise engagement leads to a deadly case of road rage.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Frozen Heart
programme.desc: Glenn Godfrey was Alaska's top cop, but he may not be able to protect himself and his family from an evil force unleashed by an ill-advised romance.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Evil Eye
programme.desc: Not long after Patrick Brown falls for a woman named Cece, he is plagued by mysterious phone calls and a creepy sense that someone is watching him. He begins to wonder if it might be a figment of his imagination.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Murder on Camera
programme.desc: Tiana Notice is young, beautiful, brilliant and lonely. That changes when she meets James Carter online. But when James reveals a dark secret, the two find themselves drawn into an increasingly dangerous and ultimately deadly battle of wits.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: An Affair to Forget
programme.desc: A young college student embarks on a secret affair with a police officer.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: To Love, Honor, and Kill
programme.desc: Noor and Marwan, young Iraqi American teens from feuding households, fall in love despite Noor's family's opposition.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Charles de Gaulle
programme.desc: June 16, 1940. Paris has fallen to the Nazis and the German conquest of France is almost complete. Prime Minister Henri Petain plans to sign an armistice with Nazi Germany, but French General Charles de Gaulle secedes and rebels against the policy.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Joseph Stalin
programme.desc: It's clear Nazi Germany lost the war, but the real winner remains uncertain. At the Yalta Conference, the United States, Britain and the Soviet Union compete for domination of Europe.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood-soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, General Robert E. Lee brings his Army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Beautiful Samurai
programme.desc: In 12th Century Japan, a female samurai humiliates all the others. As lethal as she was lovely, Tomoe Gozen defeated the finest swordsmen, battled tyranny and was innovative on the battlefield.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Rome's Navy Seals
programme.desc: They are the amphibious Roman unit tasked with the impossible. Called Batavians, they led the invasion of ancient Britain in AD43. Discover the story behind a desperate mission deep in enemy territory that may hand the emperor an unlikely victory.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Medieval Mercenaries
programme.desc: Sir John Hawkwood, a pioneer of psychology and guerilla tactics, threw out the rulebook and won battles using his wits.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: The Pope's Bodyguards
programme.desc: From stone-age Hawaii to 16th-century Japan, from Ancient Greece to the Byzantine Empire, there have always been elite Special Forces.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Devil Incarnate
programme.desc: Born in Honduras, Juan Ramon Matta Ballesteros became one of the richest cocaine smugglers in history. Ballesteros masterminded a supply route into the US, which fed much of the cocaine and crack epidemic of the 70's and 80's.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Butch Cassidy: The Perfect Criminal
programme.desc: Until the day he died, whenever that was, nobody ever outsmarted Butch Cassidy. He always got away. Cassidy was an outlaw who lived more by his wits than by his gun.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bat Masterson: Defender of Dodge
programme.desc: This well-dressed gunfighter was a gambler, a hunter, an Indian fighter, and a scout; but above all else, Bat Masterson was a lawman. As Sheriff of Ford County, Kansas, Bat Masterson kept the peace on the volatile Frontier.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Gold
programme.desc: A look at the history of gold, where most of it resides today and who owns it.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Vanished
programme.desc: Examine some of the most famous cases of disappearances that have gone on to spawn conspiracy theories to explain them. John Bingham, 7th Earl of Lucan, union leader Jimmy Hoffa and Robert Maxwell come under discussion.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Pilots and Astronauts
programme.desc: Through amazing first-hand accounts from pilots and astronauts, we'll learn that sightings of mysterious, unknown objects in our skies are far more common than we're lead to believe.

programme.desc: Examine some of the common conspiracy theories surrounding Hollywood. Suspicions about the activities of the Church of Scientology and the hacking of Sony Pictures are amongst the topics discussed.

programme.desc: Pete heads to Michigan to help a husband surprise his wife with a Swiss Family Robinson inspired treehouse for their anniversary. Far more advanced than its castaway motivation, the treehouse is supported with steel beams to hold tons of modern amenities.

programme.desc: Tamara continues renovations on the ranch by creating a new master suite. While polishing the copper fireplace hood, Tamara and her dad use a familiar solution that has unusual results. Her plans to create a sunroom run into problems due to weather.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Double Dutch Dilemma
programme.desc: Tamara gets the opportunity to renovate a French chateau she's wanted to tackle for years. She finds that a recent renovation left the kitchen looking outdated and tacky, but she's determined to create a home full of authentic details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Trouble With Cobbles
programme.desc: Tamara continues work on a French chateau as she overhauls a large master suite covered in the tackiest wallpaper she's ever ripped out. She plans to move a bathroom to create an additional bedroom and extend a hallway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Raise the Roof
programme.desc: Tamara gets creative renovating an expansive 1950s ranch-style home. She updates the exterior with faux stone and adds another floor to the 3,000-square-foot home, but rain and an old fireplace force her to rethink her plans and budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Stairway to Master Suite Heaven
programme.desc: Tamara Day uses her 1,400-square-foot second-story addition to create three new bedrooms in a 1950 ranch home.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: The Weekender
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael aim to help restore Galveston's reputation as America's 'Playground of the South.'

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Yellow Victorian
programme.desc: Ashley falls in love with an old Victorian that still has most of its original details.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Destined for Demo
programme.desc: Ashley is feeling extremely overwhelmed.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Coastal Cottage
programme.desc: Michael finds a 1931 craftsman bungalow that just came on the market which is near the beach and only $65,000.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Winner, Winner, Chicken Dinner
programme.desc: Heading back to his Southern roots, Eddie Jackson is on the hunt for the best chicken dinners. Taking comfort food to the next level, these favorite dishes are trashy, messy and spicy. Winner, winner, it's chicken for dinner!

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Veg Out
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson shares home-cooked meals that are packed with locally grown veggies straight from the plant or prepared in a way that no vegetable has ever dreamed. Get ready to veg out with a full day of eats- without the meat!

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Philadelphia
programme.desc: We're going to Philadelphia to show you some of the best things we ever ate. There's impossibly delicious pasta at Vetri and perfect mashed potatoes at Parc.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: San Diego
programme.desc: San Diego may be the land of sun, surf and fun, but it's also home to some of the best dining spots around.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Brilliantly Baked
programme.desc: It's time to indulge in some of the best baked goods imaginable as Martha Stewart shows off a beautifully perfect brioche she can't get enough of in New York City.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Upper Crust
programme.desc: The best part of any dish is what holds it all together: the crust! Chef Beau MacMillan's favorite pot pie in Phoenix, Arizona, takes on Duff Goldman's seafood pie pick in Baton Rouge, Louisiana.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: El Paso
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern is in El Paso, where Texas meets Mexico on the border as well as in the kitchen. The city is filled to the brim of its 10-gallon hat with Tex-Mex cuisine as well as Mexican classics.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Antigua Guatemala
programme.desc: Andrew checks out the vibrant and flavorful fusions of Antigua Guatemala. This locale is home to sacred food traditions and cultural mashups of Mayan and Spanish heritage. His adventure includes colorful enchiladas, tiny tamales and traditional sweets.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: frankfurt
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Frankfurt where he samples everything from the classic frankfurter and apple wine to pork shoulder with sauerkraut and hand cheese with music.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cartagena
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern shows off the tempting flavors of Cartagena, Colombia. From fried fish and sizzling egg arepas to bedroom-boosting fruits and seafood stews, the taste of the coast infuses every bite.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Alaska's Inside Passage
programme.desc: Andrew gets a whole new taste of Alaska when he visits the Inside Passage. Andrew finds out that people in this part of Alaska are still making the most of the bounty that nature has provided. He tries sea cucumbers, salmon eggs, and roasted fish heads.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Twin Cities
programme.desc: They say there's no place like home, and that's especially true for Andrew when it comes to the food scene in the Twin Cities.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Absolute Cheesiest
programme.desc: Casey’s criss-crossed the country chowing down on the best eats American has to offer, and its time to honour the best of the best by inducting the top five absolute cheesiest dishes in Man vs. Food history into our Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Bring the Heat
programme.desc: In Casey's years of facing off against food, he's taken on his fair share of heat. Casey's counting down the hottest, culminating in a challenge so spicy it may crack the Scoville scale and the number.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Phoenix, AZ
programme.desc: Casey heads to Arizona to unearth the Phoenix's most appetizing eats and take on eight wings slathered in a scorching ghost chili and habanero sauce plus two whole grilled habanero peppers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Jersey Shore, NJ
programme.desc: Casey's drive to devour America's most delicious dishes brings him back to his roots: the Jersey Shore. He's here for an explosive sandwich, stuffed lobster and a ghost chili-infused pizza challenge.

programme.title: Maury: Test Him! Is He Hiding More Cheating Videos With Other Women?
programme.desc: January found a photo in her fiancé's phone of him touching another women, but she thinks there's more. Kayla found a message her fiancé sent to another woman. Meena and Jerome are back for a lie detector test.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Mike's Not Ready
programme.desc: Mike and Molly get their signals crossed when she invites him into her house after a date and he turns her down.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Moxie Moron
programme.desc: Doug takes on a supervisory role at IPS just to prove to Carrie that he's not content with being a driver for the rest of his life. Meanwhile, Carrie decides to show her bosses that she has moxie by complaining about the company holiday gift.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Piece of Sheet
programme.desc: Feeling guilty for buying hair extensions with their joint funds, Caroline splurges on a new bedding set for Max but gives the old one to charity, not realizing her old pillowcase has sentimental value.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Vivica A. Fox, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Jodi Miller, and Pauly Shore.

programme.title: Black-ish: 30 Something
programme.desc: Dre hurts himself playing basketball right before his 40th birthday. He hands the planning over to his much younger assistant fearing he really is getting too old to be cool. Bow and Ruby face off over who gets Dre the best gift.

programme.title: Black-ish: Black Like Us
programme.desc: Dre and Bow are furious after Diane isn't lit properly in her class photo. Diane doesn't want to make it a big deal, but they decide to talk to the principal about the need for sensitivity toward all complexions.

programme.title: Silent Night: A Song for the World
programme.desc: A look at the creation and cultural impact of the song Silent Night, composed by Salzburg in 1818.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Bizarro Jerry
programme.desc: Jerry is disturbed by his date's 'man hands.' Kramer starts working in an office. George gains access to an exclusive club for models by using a photograph of his 'dead fiancée.' Elaine's new friends are exact opposites of Jerry, George and Kramer.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Maestro
programme.desc: Jerry seeks villa rentals in Tuscany after Elaine's boyfriend insists it's impossible.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Woo-Hoo, a Hernia Exam!
programme.desc: Alan takes Charlie to see the doctor after he injures himself in the act of making love.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Big Bag of Dog
programme.desc: Following his break-up with Zoey, Walden has a breakdown.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Lucky
programme.desc: Barry begs Murray to get a dog, and when they finally do, Barry is disappointed to find the dog would rather spend more time with Murray than with him. Meanwhile, Erica and Lainey plan a girls-only sleepover without Beverly.

programme.title: Mom: Nietzsche and a Beer Run
programme.desc: Christy is tempted by her old vices when she dates an attractive, hard-partying man. Meanwhile, Bonnie decides her advice is worth money and becomes a life coach.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Ding Dong Ditch
programme.desc: The Baxters are constantly being awakened by an early morning prankster who rings their doorbell and then runs away. When Mike catches the teenaged boy, the kid injures himself and his litigious father expects Mike to pay the doctor bill.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Right This Minute

programme.desc: When Mandy's new boyfriend turns out to be an animal rights activist, he clashes with Mike, who collects guns and hunts for sport.

programme.title: Mom: Freckled Bananas and a Little Schwinn
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie dip back into illegal activities, and Adam questions their morality.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Call Ended/ My Ex Is No Contractor

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Conway vs. Cruse
programme.desc: Now in struggling with 20 years of child support debt, an Omaha, NE man comes to court to prove he is not the father of his ex's adult child.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A plaintiff sues her ex-friend for almost $600 over a parking ticket. Then, a litigant disputes a breach of contract over the investment she made in a swinger's club.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman is suing her cousin for payment on a loan as well as emotional distress and says her cousin is a rowdy partier who got kicked out of high school for fighting.
